0: Plan-and-Execute Agents: An agent creates a plan, executes a step, and then
1: loops back to update the plan based on the result.

25: Choose LangChain when your application has a clear, predictable, and linear
26: flow of steps. If you can define the process from A to B to C without needing to
27: loop back, LangChain with LCEL is the perfect tool.
28: Choose LangGraph when you need your application to reason, plan, or operate
29: in a loop. If your agent needs to use tools, reflect on the results, and potentially
30: try again with a different approach, you need the cyclical and stateful nature of
